span.p:
Detects: page cache corruption
regardless of mechanism

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Behavioral, not CVE-specific:
next page cache exploit
= still detected

Default: 'Drop and execute
new binary' caught gcc only

span.p:
No file path context:
knows splice was called,
not that it targeted /etc/passwd

span.p:
Captures: source file path
(/tmp/testfile, /etc/passwd),
pipe destination, file permissions

next exploit without splice
= no detection
